enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a casual Sunday vlog recapping his weekend: he drank three large beers the night before, made some videos while drunk, slept in, watched a movie, and spent most of the day working on a computer project he describes as a 'bike racer level' thing. He also mentions visiting his mom's house to walk his brother's dog and discusses his cannabis oil/molasses product.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Prefers to spend weekends in deep work mode on the computer rather than going out
Plans to stop buying the molasses/goober product and switch back to smoking because the oil isn't getting him high enough
Unsure whether he'll continue making talking videos on weekends since he goes into work-only mode
